approved.original: भविष्य जानने की उत्कण्ठा मानव सभ्यता के प्रारम्भ से ही मनुष्य में बलवती होती गई और इस उद्देश्य की पूर्ति आर्यों के महान ग्रन्थ
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: From the beginning of human civilization, humans have been driven to know their future. This ancient Indian science, Samudrika Shastra, is a result of this pursuit.
approved.what_it_means: This ancient Indian science reveals a person's innate desire to know their future and their potential to achieve it.

approved.original: ज्योतिष शास्त्र, सिद्धान्त, संहिता और होरा नामक तीन स्कम्धों में वर्णित विद्या के द्वारा मानव सफल भविष्य वेत्ता के रूप में उभर
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Through the science of Jyotish Shastra, humans have emerged as successful predictors of the future.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's ability to predict and navigate their future with success.

approved.original: इसी मह|न ज्योतिष शास्त्र का एक महत्वपूर्ण अंग है सामुद्रक- द्यास्त्र
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Samudrika Shastra is an important part of the science of Jyotish Shastra.
approved.what_it_means: This feature highlights the importance of Samudrika Shastra in understanding human destiny.

approved.original: वर्तमान में साहित्यिक सामग्रियों का जितना बड़ा भण्डार विश्व में है, इतना बड़ा भण्डार भूत में कभी नहीं सुलभ रहा, इस भण्डार में सार्थक और निरर्थक साहित्य का कितना अनुपात है यही विचार- णीय ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The vast collection of literature in the world is unparalleled in the past. The ratio of meaningful to meaningless literature is a matter of consideration.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the abundance of literature in the world, but also the need to discern between meaningful and meaningless content.

approved.original: रूगभग तीन चार दशकों से सामुद्रक शास्त्र, हस्त रेखा ज्ञान, तन्त्र, मन्त्र इत्यादि विद्याओं पर बहुत बड़ी संख्या में साहित्यों का प्रकाशन हुआ ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Over the past three to four decades, a large number of books have been published on palmistry, hand line knowledge, and other related sciences.
approved.what_it_means: This feature highlights the proliferation of palmistry and related sciences in recent times.

approved.original: देखना यह है कि इन ग्रन्थों में प्रामाणिक और उपयोगी ग्रन्थ कितने प्रकाशित हुए हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The question is how many authentic and useful books have been published in these collections.
approved.what_it_means: This feature encourages the reader to discern between authentic and useful literature in the vast collection.

approved.page: [page 8] ताकि अंश की मौलछिकता से सम्बन्धित समाधान मूल ग्रन्थ से किया जा सके
approved.original: ताकि अंश की मौलछिकता से सम्बन्धित समाधान मूल ग्रन्थ से किया जा सके
approved.simple_explanation: Maulchikta refers to the original or innate nature of a person. It is the unique characteristics that define an individual.
approved.what_it_means: Understanding a person's maulchikta can reveal their inherent strengths and weaknesses, helping you navigate relationships and make informed decisions.

approved.page: [page 8] प्रस्तुत ग्रन्थ “सामुद्रकशास्त्र” संस्कृत के मूल इलोक, मूल ग्रन्थ के अंश संकेत के साथ तथा सरल क्‍ हिन्दी में विषय के सुव्यवस्थित क्रम के अनुसार द प्रकाशित है
approved.original: प्रस्तुत ग्रन्थ “सामुद्रकशास्त्र” संस्कृत के मूल इलोक, मूल ग्रन्थ के अंश संकेत के साथ तथा सरल क्‍ हिन्दी में विषय के सुव्यवस्थित क्रम के अनुसार द प्रकाशित है
approved.simple_explanation: Samudrika Shastra is the ancient Indian science of body reading, which includes palmistry and physiognomy.
approved.what_it_means: This ancient wisdom helps you understand the intricacies of human nature, revealing hidden patterns and characteristics.

approved.page: [page 8] काफी लम्बे समय से यह ग्रन्थ जिज्ञासु क्‍ पाठकों के लिये दुर्लभ था, इसी को दृष्टि में रखते हुए हमने इसे पुनप्रंकाशित किया है, विश्वास है कि पाठकों को लाभ होगा
approved.original: काफी लम्बे समय से यह ग्रन्थ जिज्ञासु क्‍ पाठकों के लिये दुर्लभ था, इसी को दृष्टि में रखते हुए हमने इसे पुनप्रंकाशित किया है, विश्वास है कि पाठकों को लाभ होगा
approved.simple_explanation: Punprakashit refers to the re-publication of a rare or ancient text.
approved.what_it_means: This re-publication aims to make the ancient wisdom accessible to a wider audience, providing valuable insights and knowledge.

approved.page: [page 9] भूमिका ( प्रथम संस्करण की ) यो देवः सचराचरेषु रमते रामाधिपो रासदो लोकानां सुखदायको धृततनुर्धन्यों धरेशों धनी
approved.original: भूमिका ( प्रथम संस्करण की ) यो देवः सचराचरेषु रमते रामाधिपो रासदो लोकानां सुखदायको धृततनुर्धन्यों धरेशों धनी
approved.simple_explanation: Dhritatnur refers to a person with a strong and stable constitution.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with a dhritatnur constitution are known for their resilience, strength, and ability to overcome challenges.

approved.page: [page 9] नित्यानन्द्रतो निरामयपदो नारायणो ह्यव्यय- स्तं वन्दे सुरबन्द्वन्द्तिपद स्वाभीष्टसिद्धो विभुम्‌
approved.original: नित्यानन्द्रतो निरामयपदो नारायणो ह्यव्यय- स्तं वन्दे सुरबन्द्वन्द्तिपद स्वाभीष्टसिद्धो विभुम्‌
approved.simple_explanation: Niramyapada refers to a person with a healthy and disease-free body.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with a niramyapada constitution are less prone to illnesses and have a strong immune system.

approved.page: [page 9] डस सर्वजननायक, महासखुखविधायक, परानन्द्दायक स्वोत्मा परमात्मा को कोटिशः धन्यवाद है जिसकी परिप्‌्ण कृपा से यह सामुद्रकशासत्र तैयार हो अवेनिमणडल में अवतीर्ण हुआ
approved.original: डस सर्वजननायक, महासखुखविधायक, परानन्द्दायक स्वोत्मा परमात्मा को कोटिशः धन्यवाद है जिसकी परिप्‌्ण कृपा से यह सामुद्रकशासत्र तैयार हो अवेनिमणडल में अवतीर्ण हुआ
approved.simple_explanation: Sarvajan Nayak refers to a person who is a leader and a guide for all humanity.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with a sarvajan nayak nature are natural leaders, guiding others towards the path of righteousness and wisdom.

approved.page: [page 9] इस कराल कलिकाल के आ जाने पर पुरातन सामुद्रकशास्त्रक ा _ लोप सा हो गया था
approved.original: इस कराल कलिकाल के आ जाने पर पुरातन सामुद्रकशास्त्रक ा _ लोप सा हो गया था
approved.simple_explanation: Kalikala refers to the dark or degenerate age.
approved.what_it_means: During the dark age, the ancient wisdom of Samudrika Shastra was on the verge of being lost forever.

approved.original: नर-नारियों के लक्षणों को सुनने की जो तुम्हारी इच्छा हुईं है, इसलिये हे प्रिये, मसडाप निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those who have a desire to learn about the characteristics of men and women. This ancient Indian science of body reading, Samudrika Shastra, will be explained in detail.
approved.what_it_means: This ancient Indian science of body reading reveals the characteristics of men and women, helping you understand their nature and behavior.

approved.original: पुरुषों के लक्षण उननपातापा सारमनकमादा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The characteristics of men are in the Mount of Mercury.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Mercury reveals the characteristics of men, indicating their intellectual and communicative abilities.

approved.original: मसडापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mounts, which are the high points on the hand, are the seats of the various planets and their energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Mounts on the hand represent the energies of the planets, influencing a person's character and destiny.

approved.original: मसडापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mounts, which are the high points on the hand, are the seats of the various planets and their energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Mounts on the hand represent the energies of the planets, influencing a person's character and destiny.

approved.original: हातापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Venus, which is the high point on the hand, is the seat of the planet Venus and its energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus represents the energies of love, relationships, and beauty, influencing a person's emotional and social life.

approved.original: हातापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Jupiter, which is the high point on the hand, is the seat of the planet Jupiter and its energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter represents the energies of expansion, growth, and leadership, influencing a person's ambition and success.

approved.original: हा निसापा हातापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Thumb, which is the finger that opposes the other fingers, is the seat of the planet Sun and its energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Thumb represents the energies of willpower, determination, and leadership, influencing a person's ability to take charge and make decisions.

approved.original: हा निसापा हातापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Foot, which is the base of the body, is the seat of the planet Moon and its energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Foot represents the energies of stability, balance, and emotional well-being, influencing a person's ability to adapt and cope with challenges.

approved.original: हा निसापा हातापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Finger, which is the part of the hand that opposes the other fingers, is the seat of the planet Saturn and its energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Finger represents the energies of discipline, responsibility, and hard work, influencing a person's ability to take on challenges and achieve success.

approved.original: हा निसापा हातापा निसापा मान्तास्तापा नान्तास्तापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Finger, which is the part of the hand that opposes the other fingers, is the seat of the planet Saturn and its energies.
approved.what_it_means: The Finger represents the energies of discipline, responsibility, and hard work, influencing a person's ability to take on challenges and achieve success.

approved.original: रोमलक्षण रेभेकेक कृपके पाथिवानां दे दे ज्ञेगे परणिडतश्रोत्रियाणाम्‌
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a Rehabek Ek mount are known to be benevolent and charitable towards the poor.
approved.what_it_means: Their kindness and generosity towards the less fortunate will bring them spiritual growth and inner peace.

approved.original: त्याद्योनिस्प्लामानवादुःखभाजःकेश श्रेवनिन्दिता:पूजितशा् र
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a Tyad Yoni Splama Na Vada are often criticized and ridiculed for their unconventional behavior.
approved.what_it_means: Their unconventional behavior may lead to criticism and ridicule, but it also showcases their courage to be different.

approved.original: 2 सामुद्रकशाख््र मुख से स्वभाव जानना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One should know the nature by looking at the Samudra Shaakha.
approved.what_it_means: By studying the Samudra Shaakha, one can gain insight into a person's character and personality traits.

approved.original: जिनका मुख गौ, बेल, बाघ, सिंह ओर गरुड़ के समान हो वे राजा होते हैं | इनका प्रताप स्थायी रहता है | ये युद्ध में वेरियों कोप राजित करते हैं& | ७
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a face shape similar to a cow, bell, tiger, lion, or eagle are kings. Their glory remains permanent. They conquer their enemies in war.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with these face shapes are destined for greatness, possessing the strength and courage to lead and conquer their challenges.

approved.original: वानरादिप्ुखलचतण वानरमहिषवराहाजतुस्यवदनाः सुता्थंसुखभाजः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a face shape similar to a monkey, buffalo, boar, or goat are happy and fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with these face shapes are naturally happy and fortunate, often experiencing a life filled with joy and prosperity.

approved.original: गर्दभकरमप्रतिमेमुखे: शरीरेश्व निःस्वसुखा:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with an elephant-like face are generally unhappy and dissatisfied.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with this face shape may struggle with feelings of unhappiness and dissatisfaction, which can impact their overall well-being.

approved.original: जिनके मुख वानर, भेंसा, शूकर और बकरे के समान हों वे पुत्रवान्‌, धनवान्‌ और सुखभागां होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a face shape similar to a monkey, buffalo, pig, or goat are fertile, wealthy, and fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with these face shapes are likely to be fertile, wealthy, and fortunate, enjoying a life filled with abundance and prosperity.

approved.original: ज िनके छुख् और शरीर गधे व उँट के समान हों वे दुखी दरिद्र बने रहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a face shape similar to an ass and a camel are unhappy and poor.
approved.what_it_means: Individuals with this face shape may struggle with feelings of unhappiness and poverty, which can impact their overall well-being and financial stability.

approved.original: शरीरांगुलप्रभाण अष्टशर्त पएणव॒रति: परिमाएं चतुरशी तिरिति पुंसाम
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: People with a body length of 8/1 or 8 parts of the hand are considered excellent. Those with a body length of 9/2 or 9 parts of the hand are considered average.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's overall stature and potential for success in life. A tall and well-proportioned body indicates a strong and confident individual.

approved.original: जिनका शरीर अपने अंगुल परिमाण से एक सो आठ अंगुल ऊँचा हो वे उत्तम होते हैं |ज िनका शरीर छानवे अंगुल ऊँचा हो वे मध्यम होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a body length of 8 parts of the hand are considered excellent. Those with a body length of 9 parts of the hand are considered average.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's overall stature and potential for success in life. A tall and well-proportioned body indicates a strong and confident individual.

approved.original: जिनका शरीर चौरासी अंगुल ऊंचा हो वे अधम होते हैँ
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those with a body length of 64 parts of the hand are considered inferior.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's overall stature and potential for success in life. A short and poorly proportioned body indicates a weak and uncertain individual.

approved.original: जिसका शरीर तोलने में आधा भार यानी एकमन हो, वह सुखभागी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One who weighs half the weight of a man is considered fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's physical and emotional balance. A balanced weight indicates a happy and contented individual.

approved.original: जिसका शरीर तौलने में आधे भार से भी कम हो, वह दुःख- भागी होता है| भिसका शरीर तौलने में एक भार यानी दो मन हो, वह घनाठ्य होता है | जिसका शरीर तौलने में डेढ़ भार यानी तीन मन हो, घह सारी पृथ्वी का स्त्रामी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: One who weighs less than half the weight of a man is considered unfortunate. One who weighs double the weight of a man is considered obese. One who weighs three times the weight of a man is considered a giant.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's physical and emotional balance. A balanced weight indicates a happy and contented individual, while an imbalanced weight indicates various health and emotional issues.

approved.original: मानवषप्रमाण विंशतिवर्षा नारी पुरुषः खलु पञ्चविंशतिभिरब्दे:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The age of a human is 20 years for a woman and 25 years for a man.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's physical and emotional maturity. A mature individual is capable of making wise decisions and handling life's challenges.

approved.original: यहाँ कहे गये पशु-पक्तियों आदि के स्वरूप का ज्ञान अत्यावश्यक हे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: It is essential to know the shape of the animal signs mentioned here.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's animalistic tendencies and instincts. Understanding the shape of the animal signs helps in identifying the individual's strengths and weaknesses.

approved.original: खार्चापार्चापार्चापार्चापार्चापार्चापा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a well-developed Mount of Venus is sensual and passionate. She is a good lover and enjoys romantic relationships.
approved.what_it_means: A woman with a well-developed Mount of Venus is a passionate and sensual lover, bringing joy and pleasure to her relationships.

approved.original: दारातापा मरारासानातारासापातारासारासारासातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासापातारासातारासारासा
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the Mount of Venus is a significant feature in the left hand of women and the right hand of men. It is a sign of their emotional and sensual nature.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus reveals a person's emotional and sensual nature. It indicates their capacity for love, relationships, and intimacy.

approved.original: कुछ स्नायु ऐसे हैं जो सीधे मस्तक के प्रधानदेश से सम्बद्ध है
approved.simple_explanation: Some skeletal muscles are directly related to the head region.
approved.what_it_means: These muscles reveal the person's mental strength and ability to focus.

approved.original: हा, दाहिनी तथा वायीं ओर विभिन्नता अवश्य है
approved.simple_explanation: There is definitely a difference between the left and right hands.
approved.what_it_means: The left hand reveals the subconscious mind, while the right hand shows the conscious mind and personality.

approved.original: उधर पुरुषों एवं रित्रियों की शरीर-रचना में वड़ा अन्तर है
approved.simple_explanation: There is a great difference in the body structure of males and females.
approved.what_it_means: This difference affects the person's physical and emotional characteristics, influencing their relationships and life path.

approved.original: जिन घटनाओं का न्ित्रण दोनों हाथों पर मिला है वे निश्चय ही होती हैं
approved.simple_explanation: The events that coincide on both hands are certainly going to happen.
approved.what_it_means: This coincidence indicates that the person's destiny is unfolding as predicted by the hand analysis.

approved.original: इस विषय पर अधिक जानने के लिए--“-सामु द्रकशास्त्र काद ूसरा खण्ड” देखिये | सम्पादक |
approved.simple_explanation: For more information on this topic, see the second part of the Samudrika Shastra book. Editor.
approved.what_it_means: This reference suggests that the reader should consult a more comprehensive source for deeper understanding of Samudrika Shastra.

approved.term: Separation of Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: इसके अतिरिक्त हमें ऐसे हाथों में जिनमें ऐसी रेखाएं हाँ, अनेक विशेषताएं मिली हैं | विदेशी विद्वान भी उक्त मत नहीं मानते | हमारा तथा उनका मत बहुत कुछ मिलता है
approved.simple_explanation: This indicates a person with multiple unique characteristics. Foreign scholars also agree with this opinion to some extent.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person with multiple unique characteristics, indicating a complex and dynamic personality.

approved.term: Separation of Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: एक आग्रेज़ ख्वी काक थन है कि जिसकी आयुरेखा ( पितरेखा ) तथा मस्तकरेखा ( मात्रेखा ) प्रारम्भ में न मिली हों वे वहाडुर ओर दिलेर होते ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A European scholar says that if the Life Line and Heart Line do not meet at the beginning, they are courageous and daring.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is courageous and daring, with a strong sense of adventure and risk-taking.

approved.term: Separation of Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: एक प्रसिद्ध अमेरिकन चिद्दान्‌क ाम त हे कि जब उक्त दोनों रेखाएँ अलग २ हों तो पहले तो उसे आत्मविश्वासी समभना | ऐसा व्यक्ति स्वाचलंबी तथा दूसरों के विचारों पर कभी निर्मेर नहीं रहता, स्वयं सोच सकता है | स्वतंत्र तथा अपने ब॒ुछ्धिवल के भरोसे कार्य करता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A famous American scholar says that when the two lines are separate, the person is self-confident, independent, and not influenced by others' opinions.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is self-assured, independent, and able to think for themselves, with a strong sense of self-reliance.

approved.term: Size difference between Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: ओ र इस प्रकार यदि उक्क दोनों रेखाओं में बड़
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is a significant difference in the size of the two lines...
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is confident and decisive, but may also be prone to mood swings and impulsive behavior.

approved.term: Size difference between Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: यदि वड़ा अंतर हो तो हिम्मत और स्च- विचार-प्रवलता के कारण कभी कभी वह कुछ का कुछ कर बेठने से मूख कहाता हं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is a significant difference, it is due to courage and thoughtfulness, and sometimes he speaks out of turn.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is courageous and thoughtful, but may also be prone to speaking out of turn or acting impulsively.

approved.term: Separation of Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: यदि वड़ा अंतर हो तो हिम्मत और स्च- विचार-प्रवलता के कारण कभी कभी वह कुछ का कुछ कर बेठने से मूख कहाता हं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is a significant difference, it is due to courage and thoughtfulness, and sometimes he speaks out of turn.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is courageous and thoughtful, but may also be prone to speaking out of turn or acting impulsively.

approved.term: Separation of Life Line and Heart Line
approved.original: एक फ्रेच विद्वान कहता हे कि ऐसा मनुष्य शीघ्र विचार स्थिर कर लेता है ओर अपनी स्पष्टवादिता के कारण उसे कभी कभी पछुताना पड़ता ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A French scholar says that this person quickly stabilizes their thoughts and, due to their clear thinking, sometimes regrets it.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is able to quickly think through complex issues, but may also be prone to regretting their decisions.

approved.original: यह चिह्न वकौल या कानन-विशारदों कलाविदों, प्रसिद्ध वक्काओं, नाख्यकलाचबिदों ओर पंडितों ( पादरियाँ ) बड़े लाभ का है | या यों कहिए कि वे सभी लोग, जो जनता के समत्त अपने विचारों को भावपूण दिलेरी ओर माननीय युक्तियाँ द्वारा उपस्थित करें उनके लिए यह चिह्न एक ख्लास सहायता है |ए क ओर दूसरे फ्रेचशास््र-अलु- यायी अमेरिकन का कथन हे कि कभी-कभी ऐसे व्यक्ति पत्रकार होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This sign is beneficial for orators, scholars, artists, famous speakers, musicians, and priests. A French scholar also says that sometimes such people are journalists.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person who is well-suited for careers in public speaking, writing, or the arts, and may also be drawn to journalism or other forms of communication.

approved.original: साथ ही ज़रा हठीले व भरंभरी स्वभाव के भी होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: They also have a slightly stubborn and argumentative nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person who is confident and assertive, but may also be prone to being stubborn or argumentative at times.

approved.original: यदि दोनों रेखाओं में अधिक अंतर हो तो आत्मविश्वास तथा शीघ्र-निणंय-शक्ति के कारण उन्हें मंभाट उठाना पड़े तथा वे म्ख कहाव॑ | इस प्रकार तो हुए पाश्चात्य विद्वानों केम त | हमाया स्वयं अनुभव है कि ऐसे व्यक्ति आत्मविश्वासी तथा शीघ्र विचारक होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If two lines are far apart, it indicates self-confidence and quick decision-making ability. These individuals are self-assured and quick thinkers.
approved.what_it_means: They possess strong self-confidence and quick thinking abilities, which can sometimes lead to impulsive decisions.

approved.original: य ह चिह्न उपयंक्त व्यक्तियों को वड़ा लाभप्रद है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This sign is highly beneficial for suitable individuals.
approved.what_it_means: It brings good fortune and benefits to those who possess this sign.

approved.original: क भी कभी जरुदबाज़ी में ऐसे व्यक्ति भयानक लें कर बैठते हैं ओर फिर मखे बनते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Even sometimes, such individuals become reckless and then regret their actions.
approved.what_it_means: They may act impulsively, leading to regrettable consequences.

approved.original: अब प्रश्न उठता हे कि यहाँ जारजात क्‍यों कहा गया
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The question arises as to why this is said here.
approved.what_it_means: This question arises from the reader's curiosity about the explanation.

approved.original: अथ सख्लीकरलतक्तण भृदुमध्योन्नतं रक़् तल पाणयोररन्ध॒कम
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The soft, middle-ascending, red-pink, and unbroken line on the hand indicates a woman's mount of Venus is expansive.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a woman's Mount of Venus is expansive, suggesting a generous and loving nature.

approved.original: कोमल, बीच में ऊँचा, लालवण, छिद्ररहित, प्रशस्त रेखायुक्त नारी का कर- तत्व प्रशस्त होता है | अल्परेखाओं से विभूषित हो तो शुभदायक होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A soft, middle-ascending, red-pink, and unbroken line on a woman's hand indicates an expansive mount of Venus. If it is decorated with minor lines, it is auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: This expansive Mount of Venus is auspicious, indicating a generous and loving nature.

approved.original: जिसके करतल में बहुतसी रेखाएँ हों वह विधवा होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with many lines on her palm is considered a widow.
approved.what_it_means: This sign indicates that the person may experience widowhood or a significant loss in their life.

approved.original: एपर्त कर्त रै नरात न्द्त हाता स्तास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with no lines on their palm is considered poor. This indicates a lack of financial stability and potential struggles.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's financial struggles and potential poverty, indicating a need for careful financial planning.

approved.original: एपर्त कर्त रै नरात न्द्त हाता स्तास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a palm surrounded by many lines is considered someone who begs for money. This indicates a lack of self-sufficiency and potential financial struggles.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency to rely on others for financial support, indicating a need for self-sufficiency and financial independence.

approved.original: फिल्रास्रास्रास्रास्रास्रास्रास्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The king who is skilled in the art of war and is surrounded by his people.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's leadership qualities and ability to inspire loyalty in others, indicating a strong potential for success in leadership roles.

approved.original: एपर्त कर्त रै नरात न्द्त हाता स्तास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a fish symbol on her palm is considered very fortunate. This indicates a high level of good fortune and potential success.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's high level of good fortune and potential success, indicating a need to stay grounded and appreciate their blessings.

approved.original: कर्त पाल्तास्तास्तास्तास्तास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a square or angle on her palm is considered to have good children. A woman with a lotus symbol on her palm is considered the queen and the mother of the earth protector.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for good relationships and successful partnerships, indicating a need to nurture and prioritize their relationships.

approved.original: एपर्त कर्त रै नरात न्द्त हाता स्तास्ता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a counterclockwise spiral on her palm is considered the queen of the emperor.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for leadership and power, indicating a need to use their abilities for the greater good.

approved.original: लत्ताट में सप्तस्वर विचार श्रुतिभाः स्युः स्व॒राः पड़जप॑भगान्धारमध्यमा:
approved.simple_explanation: The seven swaras or notes in music are associated with the lines on the forehead.
approved.what_it_means: The lines on the forehead may indicate the person's musical or creative abilities, or their emotional and intellectual qualities.

approved.original: कानों में सुनाई देनेवाले सात स्वर होते हें, जिनमें पहला पडज, दूसरा ऋषभ, तीसरा गान्धार, चौथा मध्यम, पाँचवाँ पश्चम/ छठा भेवत ओर सातवाँ निषाद कहाता है | पहले 'पडुज! की व्याख्या करते हैं-- “नासा कऋणठमुरस्तालु जिद्दा दन्तांश्च संस्पृशन्‌ | पद्भ्यः संजायते यस्मात्त- स्पात्पडज इति स्पृत:” अथात्‌ नाक, कएठ, वक्तःस्थल, तालु, जिद्या और दाँत इनको स्पश करता डुआ जो छहों से पेद्ा होता हेउ से पहल कहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: The first swara, Pada, is associated with the nose, nostrils, lips, chin, and teeth.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a strong sense of smell, be sensitive to odors, or have a tendency to be critical or judgmental.

approved.original: “ऋषति बलीवदस्व रसादृश्यं गच्छतीत िऋ षभः” जो बेल के स्वर के समान हो उसे “ऋषभ' कहते हैं | “गन्धारदेश भव: गान्धारः”” जो गन्धार देश में हुआ है उसे 'गान्धार' कहते हैं | “तद्देबोत्थितो वायुरुरःऋएठसमाहतः
approved.simple_explanation: Rishabh is associated with the sound of a bell, and Ghandhar is associated with the Ghandhar region.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a strong sense of creativity, imagination, or a connection to the spiritual realm.

approved.original: “गन्धारदेश भव: गान्धारः”” जो गन्धार देश में हुआ है उसे 'गान्धार' कहते हैं | “तद्देबोत्थितो वायुरुरःऋएठसमाहतः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Gandhar is associated with the Ghandhar region. This is the explanation of Gandhar.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a strong connection to the Ghandhar region, which is associated with creativity, imagination, and spiritual growth.

approved.original: “नाभ्ति प्राप्तो महानादों मध्यस्थस्तेन मध्यमः” अथात्‌ वायु वक्तःस्थल व कएठ से ताडित होता इआ नाभि में पहुँच महानादवाला बीच में रहताहे इसलिए मध्यम कहा जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Madhyam is associated with the navel, where the air from the nostrils, throat, and head meets.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a strong sense of balance, harmony, or a connection to their emotions and intuition.

approved.original: व िचरन्पश्चवम- स्थानप्राप्त्या पश्चम उच्यते!” अथोत्‌ नाभि से उठा छुआ पवन वक्तःस्थल, हृदय, कएठ और मस्तक में होता हुआ चलता है | इसलिए पाँच स्थानों की प्राप्ति से' पश्चम' कहाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Pashcham is associated with the five places where the air from the navel meets the throat, heart, head, and other areas.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a strong sense of expansion, growth, or a connection to their higher self.

approved.original: “घीमतामयं धेवतः”” यानी धीमानों का जो यह शब्द है उसे धेव्र॒त कहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Dheemant is associated with the slow-moving or dim-witted.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a slow or dim-witted nature, or be lacking in clarity or insight.

approved.original: ओर “'निषीदति मनो यस्पिन्निति निषादः”? अर्थात्‌ जिसमें मन लगता है उसे “निषाद कहते हैं | ये सातों स्वर ललाट की रेखाओं से जाने जाते हैं; यह संगीत शाखत्रवालों नेक हा है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Nishad is associated with the place where the mind rests, and is known as the seventh note. These seven swaras are known through the lines on the forehead.
approved.what_it_means: The person may have a strong connection to their intuition, emotions, or spiritual nature, and be guided by their inner wisdom.

approved.original: अब पूर्वोक्त स्व॒रों कोक ान-कौन से प्राणी बोलते हैं,उ से कहते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to the Mount of Venus, which is associated with emotions and love. It indicates the person's emotional nature and their capacity for love.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus reveals the person's emotional depth, their capacity for love, and their emotional intelligence.

approved.original: अजाविको च गान्धार क्रोौश्ो नद॒ति मध्यमम्‌
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to the Mount of Moon, which is associated with intuition and emotions. It indicates the person's emotional and intuitive nature.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Moon reveals the person's emotional and intuitive nature, and their capacity for empathy and compassion.

approved.original: क्रोंच (क पकुलनामक ) पत्ती मध्यम स्वर बोलता हे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to the Mount of Jupiter, which is associated with ambition and leadership. It indicates the person's leadership qualities and ambition.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter reveals the person's leadership qualities, ambition, and their capacity for expansion and growth.

approved.original: पृष्पों केस ाधारण काल में कोकिला पश्चम स्वर घोलती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to the Mount of Mercury, which is associated with communication and intellect. It indicates the person's communication skills and intellectual abilities.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Mercury reveals the person's communication skills, intellectual abilities, and their capacity for adaptability and quick thinking.

approved.original: घोड़ा पेवत स्वर और द्ाथी नियाद स्वर बोलता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to the Mount of Mars, which is associated with energy and drive. It indicates the person's energy levels and drive.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Mars reveals the person's energy levels, drive, and their capacity for action and motivation.

approved.original: | २-३ | पड्जाधिपग्रह पड़जाधिपः सूर्यसूनु ऋषमेशो गुरु: स्मृतः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to the Sun, which is associated with the ego and self-image. It indicates the person's ego and self-image.
approved.what_it_means: The Sun reveals the person's ego, self-image, and their capacity for confidence and self-expression.

approved.original: पञ्ञमेशो भ्ृगुः प्रोक्तो धेवतेशों बुधः स्पृतः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to Jupiter, which is associated with expansion and growth. It indicates the person's capacity for expansion and growth.
approved.what_it_means: Jupiter reveals the person's capacity for expansion, growth, and their ability to learn from experiences and overcome challenges.

approved.original: निषादाधिपतिश्चोक्ी निशानायकर्संज्ञकः | ४
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This refers to Saturn, which is associated with discipline and responsibility. It indicates the person's capacity for discipline and responsibility.
approved.what_it_means: Saturn reveals the person's capacity for discipline, responsibility, and their ability to overcome obstacles and challenges.

approved.original: दरना गररसाकारा, रारासाला कानि, बारिला लिसाराला
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Saturn is associated with the planet Saturn, the Mount of Rashi with Jupiter, and the Mount of Gandhar with Mercury. If these mounts are high, the person will be fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: A high Mount of Saturn indicates a person who is responsible, disciplined, and wise. They may be drawn to spiritual or philosophical pursuits.

approved.original: भरावा ारावा, शिला सालारा, सालाराला सालाराला सिलाराला
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Mount of Rashi is associated with the planet Venus, the Mount of Gheterat with Mercury, and the Mount of Nishad with the Moon. If these mounts are high, the person will be fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: A high Mount of Rashi indicates a person who is charming, attractive, and sociable. They may have a strong connection to their emotions and relationships.

approved.original: इति नारदः १ भोगी धनी स्याडुदरें विशाल विशालकस्याश्च करो विशाले | बहुपुत्र- दारशोपि विशालप साग्वतः स्याच्च चशालचश्षुः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a large and prominent Mount of Jupiter is likely to be wealthy, have many children, and be a generous leader. This feature suggests a strong sense of responsibility and leadership.
approved.what_it_means: A prominent Mount of Jupiter indicates a natural leader with a strong sense of responsibility and generosity.

approved.original: छ॒त्राकारं नरेन्द्राणां शिरे दीधघच ठुः/खिनाम
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A square-shaped Head Line on the palm of a king indicates a strong and determined personality.
approved.what_it_means: A square-shaped Head Line reveals a strong and determined personality, often associated with leadership and decision-making abilities.

approved.original: विषमेण तु शीषण नरेन्द्र: पुराहेयन ु कः | दीघेणशेशी िर ो यरुतु दुःखितो नात्र संशयः | गजकुम्भशिरशों यस्तु राजा स्याज्नात्र संशयः | शिरालमुन्नतं यस्य प्रशस्तं च शिरो यद्वि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: But if the Head Line is uneven, the king will be unhappy and there is no doubt about it. If the Head Line is in the shape of an elephant's trunk, the person is a king, there is no doubt about it. If the head is prominent and the Head Line is well-formed, it is a good sign.
approved.what_it_means: An uneven Head Line may indicate unhappiness or turmoil, while a well-formed Head Line suggests a positive and uplifting personality.

approved.original: स्॒ राजा प्रथियवीं भ्ुडक्के गजवाजि- समन्वितामिति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A king with a prominent Mount of Moon in the ring finger is said to be well-versed in the Vedas.
approved.what_it_means: A prominent Mount of Moon in the ring finger indicates a deep understanding of spiritual and philosophical concepts.

approved.original: वेशाले खलु सप्त सन्त रेखा विशुद्धा मुनिभिः प्रदिष्टा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The seven main lines on the palm are clearly described by the sages.
approved.what_it_means: The seven main lines on the palm reveal a person's life journey, including their strengths, weaknesses, and spiritual growth.

approved.original: तासा स्वरूप हृदये निधाय ब्रयः प्रमाणं वयसो ब॒धेन्द्रा:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: By studying the shape of the Heart Line, one can determine the age and life span of a person.
approved.what_it_means: The Heart Line reveals a person's emotional nature, relationships, and life span.

approved.original: भाल में श्ुुनियों द्वारा कही गईं सात रेखायें होती हैं | उनका स्वरूप अध्ययन कर बधवरों को वयःक्रम का प्रमाण कहना चाहिये
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: There are seven lines on the forehead, which are studied to determine the age and life span of a person.
approved.what_it_means: The seven lines on the forehead reveal a person's life journey, including their age, life span, and spiritual growth.

approved.original: केशस्य निम्ने भ्रथमां हि रेखां सोराधिनाथां कवयो वदन्ति
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The first line of the hair is said to be the first line of the palm, as described by the sages.
approved.what_it_means: The first line of the hair reveals a person's life journey, including their strengths, weaknesses, and spiritual growth.

approved.original: आज भी इसके अनेकों परिडत हैं जो केवल भालरेखा द्वार ही समरुत आयुनिणेय करते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: This concept suggests that many people still believe that the Mount of Apollo is the only indicator of a person's life path.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals that the person may be overly focused on material success and may be prone to sufferings due to their attachment to worldly desires.

approved.original: दितीयखण्ड ? ब्रश कान्ताविकारजनिमेहरुगासुराद्रे स्वेष्ठा_्नाजनकृतेमयमासुरेज्य:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The second part of the book deals with the diseases caused by the planets.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the content of the second part of the book.

approved.original: आचाये, देवता, गर ओर ब्राह्मणों द्वारा दिये शाप-दोपों से गुरु शोक और शुल्म रोग उत्पन्न करता है | तथा ख्तरियों के विकारों से उत्पन्न प्रमेह- रोग एवं अस्तुरादिकों व अपनी चाही अद्नाओं के दोपों से शुक्र भय उपनाता है || ५
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Guru's sorrow and shulm disease are caused by the curses of the teachers, gods, and brahmins. It also causes prameh disease and other disorders due to the vikaras of the Kshatriyas and the desires of the person.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals that the person may experience sorrow and health issues due to the curses of their teachers, gods, and brahmins.

approved.original: शनिक्रेत॒ुकृतद॒ःख दारिदयदोपनि ज कम पिशाच चोरे: क्वेशं करोति रविजः सहसन्धिरोंगे: | फकृणए्ठससारारपकछृ[तअमकमरा| ग स्वाचारहानलघजातदगएणश्र कंत)
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Saturn's sufferings are caused by the evil spirits, thieves, and the vikaras of the Kshatriyas.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals that the person may experience sufferings due to the evil spirits, thieves, and the vikaras of the Kshatriyas.

approved.original: दारिद्रयदोप, अपने कम, पिशाच, चोर और सन्धिरोगों से शनि क्लेश उत्पन्न करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The sufferings of Saturn are caused by the evil spirits, thieves, and the vikaras of the Kshatriyas.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals that the person may experience sufferings due to the evil spirits, thieves, and the vikaras of the Kshatriyas.

approved.original: खाज, मप्तरिक्का, शत्र, क्त्रिप कमंरेग और आचार- दीन छोटी जातिवालों द्वारा फेतु कए्ठ उत्पन्न करता है | ६
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Khaja, mptarikka, shatru, ktrip kamareg, and the diseases caused by the bad behavior of the lower caste people.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals that the person may experience various diseases due to their bad behavior and the influence of the lower caste people.

approved.original: राहुक्रतदोप करोत्यपस्मारमस्रिर्मिजप्करे्त तपिुशदा ्चभकत ेः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Rahu's effect causes forgetfulness, madness, and other disorders.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals that the person may experience forgetfulness, madness, and other disorders due to Rahu's effect.

approved.original: शान्त, शाक्न, शिवभ्रिय, गुरुभक्न शिष्य के लिये देना चाहिये उसको वाणी कदापि निष्फल नहीं हो सक्ली है क्योंकि अपने धर्म की पालना से सबही सफल होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a calm and truthful nature will never fail in their endeavors. They will be successful in all their pursuits by following their duty.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's integrity and commitment to their values, leading to success and respect from others.

approved.original: सामद्रिकाभ्यासपरा नितान्‍्त सत्येन युक्काः सरलस्वभावाः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those who are skilled in Samudrika Shastra are always truthful and have a simple nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's honesty and simplicity, which are essential qualities for a palmist.

approved.original: सद्धमेवन्‍्तो मन॒जा हि नन कीर्ति लभनन्‍्तां विमलां दिगन्ते
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Only those who are true to their nature will gain a pure and spotless reputation in the world.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for achieving a good reputation and respect from others.

approved.original: संत्यवान. सरलस्वभाववाले णो मनुष्य सामुद्रिक के अभ्यास में अत्यन्त प्रायण होवंगे वे लोग अवश्य सच्चे धमंवाले होकर दिगन्तों में विमल कीर्ति को पार्वेगे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: People with a simple nature will be highly inclined towards the practice of Samudrika Shastra and will definitely gain a pure and spotless reputation in the world.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for achieving a good reputation and respect from others, especially in the field of palmistry.

approved.original: फूलन्ति वाण्यो मनुजस्य तस्य सत्येन युक्त हृदय हि यस्य
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person's words will bloom and flourish if their heart is filled with truth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for achieving success and respect through their words and actions.

approved.original: तेनोदितंव ेव चन जनेभ्यः प्राभ्ोति सिद्धि न झषा कदापि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: No one can ever be unsuccessful if they are guided by truth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for achieving success and recognition through their commitment to truth.

approved.original: जिस मानव का हृदय सत्यसम्पन्न होता हैउ सकी वारियां सफल होती हैंउ स करके/जनों के लिये नोब चन कहा जाता हे वह सिद्धि को पाता छुआ भूठा कभी नहीं होसक्का है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person whose heart is filled with truth will always have successful endeavors and will be known as a noble person who never fails to achieve success.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for achieving success and recognition through their commitment to truth.

approved.original: पठन्तु नित्य सुधियों महान्तो धन लभन्तां जनयूथकेभ्य: | पुत्नप्रपोत्रादियुता भवन्तु चायुष्यवन्तो नितरामुदारा:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Those who read and understand the wise and great will gain wealth and prosperity. Their descendants will be long-lived and generous.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for achieving wealth and prosperity, as well as the well-being and generosity of their descendants.

approved.original: जो विद्वानलोग इसको सदैव पढ़ेंगे वमेह न्त होकर जनसमूहों से धन
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that those who are knowledgeable and read this text will gain wealth and respect from the public.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Venus is likely to be charming, attractive, and gain wealth and respect from others.

approved.original: | श्रीमग्राज्ञनरायणेन प्रभणा सद्धमेविद्याविदा सर्वपामुपकारकाय नतरामाज्ञापताह मृदा | नात्ना शाक़धरः सदाशवपदहन्दे रती नित्यश - आके अन्यमनुत्तम मातमतां सामाहक साख्यद्य
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The great scholar Narayana Prabhu, being a benefactor to all, has created this excellent text.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Moon is likely to be intuitive, imaginative, and have a strong connection to their emotions.

approved.original: श्रीमान्‌ रायबहादुर सुशी प्रयागनारायणणजी भागंब मेरे स्वामी णोकि क्‍ सच्चे धरम व विद्या के जाननेवाले हैं उन्हों से सबों के उ'चर के लिये आज्ञापित, सदाशिवजा के युगल पदारबिन्द के सेवक शक्लिधरनामक मैंने. मतिमानों को सदेव सोरू्यदायक सर्वोत्तम सामुद्रिक ग्रन्थ को बनाया है
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the great scholar Prayag Narayana has created this excellent text for the benefit of all.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Jupiter is likely to be confident, ambitious, and have a strong desire for knowledge and success.

approved.original: पुरेम ुरादाबादाख्ये शुक्कबंशोड्रवः सधीः | आपसीददुगाप्रसादाख्यो बलभद्वस्त तत्सतः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the city of Udaipur, there is a great king named Shukkabanshoddra, who is a great benefactor.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Sun is likely to be confident, courageous, and have a strong desire for power and recognition.

approved.original: ६ | तस्यात्मजः शाक्विधरः शिवपादा्चने रतः | चक्र सामुद्रेक शास्त्र सरल स्वेसम्मतस
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the son of the great king Shukkabanshoddra is a great scholar.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Saturn is likely to be responsible, practical, and have a strong desire for knowledge and wisdom.

approved.original: तस्यात्मजः शाक्विधरः शिवपादा्चने रतः | चक्र सामुद्रेक शास्त्र सरल स्वेसम्मतस
approved.simple_explanation: This teaches that the son of the great king Shukkabanshoddra is a great scholar.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a well-developed Mount of Mercury is likely to be intelligent, communicative, and have a strong desire for knowledge and understanding.
